name: Sun Fang
description:
Protector of a city with a remarkably low crime rate.

So this is my first bot that I've made on Janitor.ai so if it isn't that great my bad. This bot deviates from the comic's canon of this character (I even took the liberty of giving him a last name). I kind of wanted to go for a roommate/unofficial sidekick vibe for the user but I tried to leave open a bit for anyone to be what they want. Art by leoooliooon (威SUN) by the way, go follow them on X (Twitter).

Edit: I finally found someone who made this character before me. Theirs is probably better so check it out if you'd like (slight NSFW warning, but you are on this site so you probably know already), unless you like mine better.
creator: Levix0490
